parameters.query: SELECT chat_id, profile, refreshed_at FROM style_profile WHERE chat_id = @@CHAT_ID@@ LIMIT 1;
SELECT ts, chat_id, action, decision, intent_confidence FROM audit_log ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, created_at, chat_id, description, tool, args, status FROM pending_actions WHERE status IN ('pending','awaiting') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT status, COUNT(*)::int AS n FROM execution_entity WHERE "startedAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC;

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT last_cum_usd FROM spend_track_state LIMIT 1),0),4) AS total_usd,
       (SELECT updated_at FROM spend_track_state LIMIT 1) AS as_of,
       ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM spend_log),0),4) AS logged_usd,
       (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM spend_log) AS log_rows;

SELECT id, message->>'type' AS role, message->'data'->>'content' AS content, message->'data'->'tool_calls' AS tool_calls FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT id, trace_id, session_id, turn_id, tool_name, tool_call_id, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms FROM agent_trace_events WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50;

WITH per_call AS (SELECT tool_call_id, max(tool_name) AS tool_name, max(turn_id) AS turn_id, min(started_at) AS started_at, max(finished_at) AS finished_at, bool_or(status = 'success') AS had_success, bool_or(status = 'failed') AS had_failure, (array_agg(error_message) FILTER (WHERE error_message IS NOT NULL))[1] AS error_message, (array_agg(input_summary ORDER BY id))[1] AS input_summary FROM agent_trace_events WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@' AND started_at > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY tool_call_id) SELECT pc.tool_call_id, pc.tool_name, pc.turn_id, pc.started_at, pc.error_message, pc.input_summary, CASE WHEN pc.had_failure THEN 'failed' WHEN pc.finished_at IS NULL THEN 'silently_dropped' ELSE 'no_success' END AS mismatch_kind, ch.message->'data'->>'content' AS operator_message FROM per_call pc LEFT JOIN n8n_chat_histories ch ON ch.id = pc.turn_id WHERE (pc.had_failure OR NOT pc.had_success) AND pc.started_at < now() - interval '90 seconds' ORDER BY pc.started_at DESC LIMIT 50;

assignments.name: error
assignments.value: unknown query_name — valid: style_profile_get, recent_audit_log, pending_actions_open, executions_summary_24h, spend_total, conversation_transcript, tool_trace_recent, claim_actual_mismatch

parameters.query: INSERT INTO agent_trace_events (trace_id, session_id, turn_id, tool_name, tool_call_id, status, input_summary, started_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.tool_call_id }}', 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@', (SELECT max(id) FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@'), 'postgres_named_query', '{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.tool_call_id }}', 'attempted', '{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.input_summary_sql }}'::jsonb, now());

UPDATE agent_trace_events SET status = '{{ $json.ok ? "success" : "failed" }}', output_summary = jsonb_build_object('ok', {{ $json.ok ? "true" : "false" }}, 'row_count', {{ Array.isArray($json.rows) ? $json.rows.length : 0 }}), error_message = {{ $json.ok ? "NULL" : "'tool returned ok:false'" }}, finished_at = now(), duration_ms = CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - started_at)) * 1000 AS INTEGER) WHERE tool_call_id = '{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.tool_call_id }}';
